title: Ruby Netherite
description: The Resource Pack changes the texture of netherite gear and items to Ruby items.
body:
![Banner of Everything](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6c0ceba25dfcf724c59a85e7e667a223afdb8b6_0.webp)Bring a vibrant new look to your endgame gear with the Ruby Equipment resource pack! This pack completely reimagines Netherite tools, weapons, and armor with a brilliant ruby-red aesthetic, giving your most powerful equipment a bold and fiery personality.

Features:
- Ruby-Themed Netherite Items: All Netherite swords, pickaxes, shovels, axes, and hoes have been redesigned with deep crimson blades and shimmering ruby inlays.

- Armor Overhaul: Netherite armor now features a rich red gemstone motif, polished plating, and subtle glow-like highlights for a regal, gemstone-powered appearance.

- Matching Icons & UI: Hotbar item icons and inventory textures match the new ruby style for full visual consistency.

- Faithful Design: Maintains the default Minecraft art style, ensuring the pack blends seamlessly into vanilla gameplay while still feeling fresh and unique.

Perfect for players who want their gear to feel rare and precious, Ruby Equipment keeps all the power of Netherite while adding a jewel-like beauty that stands out in any world.

Compatibility:

- Minecraft Java Edition 1.20+
- Fully compatible with OptiFine and shader packs for enhanced visuals.
